Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.ArrayValidator

Packages that use ArrayValidator 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

  • Uses of ArrayValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return ArrayValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static ArrayValidator<boolean[],​Boolean> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(boolean[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive boolean array.
    static ArrayValidator<byte[],​Byte> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(byte[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive byte array.
    static ArrayValidator<char[],​Character> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(char[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive char array.
    static ArrayValidator<double[],​Double> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(double[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive double array.
    static ArrayValidator<float[],​Float> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(float[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive float array.
    static ArrayValidator<int[],​Integer> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(int[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive int array.
    static ArrayValidator<long[],​Long> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(long[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive long array.
    static ArrayValidator<short[],​Short> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(short[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive short array.
    static <E> ArrayValidator<E[],​E> DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(E[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of an Object array.
    ArrayValidator<boolean[],​Boolean> Requirements.validateThat​(boolean[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive boolean array.

    Validates the requirements of a primitive byte array.

    Validates the requirements of a primitive char array.

    Validates the requirements of a primitive double array.

    Validates the requirements of a primitive float array.

    Validates the requirements of a primitive int array.
    ArrayValidator<long[],​Long> Requirements.validateThat​(long[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive long array.
    ArrayValidator<short[],​Short> Requirements.validateThat​(short[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a primitive short array.
    <E> ArrayValidator<E[],​E> Requirements.validateThat​(E[] actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of an Object array.

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    ArrayValidator<E[],​E> ExtensibleCollectionValidator.asArray​(Class<E> type)
    Returns a validator for the actual value as an array.

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    S ExtensibleCollectionValidator.asArray​(Class<E> type, Consumer<ArrayValidator<E[],​E>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.

  • Uses of ArrayValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ArrayValidator 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  ArrayValidatorImpl<A,​E>
    Default implementation of ArrayValidator.
    class  ArrayValidatorNoOp<A,​E>
    An ArrayValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
